processImprovements: [self-critique] Consolidation has run 13+ times since bootstrap with zero real content to process. The process is mechanically correct but producing no value — each run generates reports about having nothing to report. This is a meta-level inefficiency: the guard script's 24h threshold doesn't account for brain activity level.

[proposal] Implement an activity-aware consolidation threshold: if the last N consolidation reports all show zero content promoted and zero user sessions, extend the guard interval (e.g., to 48h or 72h) until real activity resumes. This would reduce report bloat without missing real consolidation needs.
